```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement API SDK client generation from OpenAPI spec"
---
# API SDK Generation
## Task
Generate SDK client from OpenAPI specification.
## Requirements
1. Generate typed client for Python and TypeScript. 2. Include request/response models.
3. Handle authentication automatically. 4. Include retry logic and error handling.
5. Generate documentation from spec.
## Constraints
- Keep SDK in sync with API changes. Version SDK with API version.
## Success Criteria
- SDK matches API spec exactly. Types correct. Auth handled. Retries built in.
```
